quotes: Photography: **warm, realistic patient lifestyle imagery** — real moments of simple, everyday activity (walking the dog, beach, BBQ).
Images are housed in the **Accent shape** (§2.5) — asymmetric rounded-corner crops, not plain rectangles or circles.
Waves and gradients may overlay photography.
Every image requires **descriptive alt text** (brand accessibility rule).

rules.intent: Ensure photography is brand-aligned and meets regulatory accessibility standards.
rules.rule_text: Photography must feature warm, realistic patient lifestyle imagery showing everyday activity (e.g., walking the dog, beach, BBQ). Images must be housed in the asymmetric Accent shape with rounded-corner crops instead of plain rectangles or circles. Waves and gradients may overlay photography. Every image must include descriptive alt text for accessibility compliance.
